commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 07 Jul

NYSE maintains commanding liquidity supremacy with the lowest ILLIQ score (0.0015) and tightest AR spread (0.4596%), reflecting deep order books and minimal price impact. Conversely, London Stock Exchange ranks last, exhibiting substantially higher illiquidity (0.1361) and widest AR spread (0.8420%), suggesting thinner participation. Notably, Nasdaq 100's elevated Roll spread (1.6890%) contrasts its relatively strong ILLIQ positioning, indicating concentrated bid-ask clustering despite overall depth.
